shared_patterns.pattern: use of informal language and conversational tone

repeated structure of stating a problem followed by a personal anecdote
variations of expressing frustration or confusion
inconsistent capitalization and punctuation

i've tried resetting my password

specific details about issues (e.g., order numbers, app features)
